title: Blogs
description: Deep dives on RTL design patterns, verification methodology, EDA automation, and silicon-engineering best practices - written by practising engineers.

posts.title: RTL Coding Guidelines for Synthesis-Ready Designs
posts.excerpt: Common pitfalls in SystemVerilog coding that silently degrade synthesis QoR - and how to avoid them with disciplined register-infer and always-block patterns.

posts.title: Coverage Closure Strategies in Large UVM Environments
posts.excerpt: Structuring functional coverage models and using constraint-solving to close coverage holes without inflating runtime.

posts.title: Building a Hardware CI/CD Pipeline with GitHub Actions
posts.excerpt: Automating lint, simulation, and formal checks on every commit - reducing integration bugs and shortening verification cycles.

posts.title: RISC-V Custom Extensions: Architecture to Software Workflow
posts.excerpt: A practical walkthrough of adding custom instructions to a RISC-V core and exposing them through a GCC compiler intrinsic.

posts.title: Multi-Corner Timing Closure: Pitfalls and Practical Fixes
posts.excerpt: Why OCV / AOCV settings cause post-route timing explosions and proven SDC constraint strategies that do not over-constrain.

posts.title: Formal Property Verification: From Assertions to Sign-off
posts.excerpt: Writing effective SVA properties for JasperGold and interpreting vacuity and unreachability results to achieve robust formal sign-off.

placeholderDescription: Subscribe to be notified when the first posts go live.
